title: こちとら江戸っ子でい！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been some time since I became a trainer at Tracen Academy, but I
still have no trainee—heck, I haven't even attempted to scout anyone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not for a lack of talent, of course. Every student here is packed with
potential. But whenever I think about scouting a runner, something
always holds me back...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I see. Well then, if I may offer some advice... perhaps what you need to do is think outside the box?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
That's right! ♪ As I'm sure you know, the Twinkle Series isn't the only
race series Umamusume run in!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Each region of Japan also holds its own independent series, and the
racers there compete just as fiercely as those in national races.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
In the past, we've had trainers find real talented racers in the
regionals. We've simply transferred them to Tracen Academy so they
could sign a contract.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing as there's a race today in Oi, I decide to head over to see
what their racers are made of. However...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The confusion that comes with navigating a new area is one thing, but
on top of that...

text_block_list.name: Fiesty Stray Cat
text_block_list.text: MRRRAOW!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I encounter an absolute beast of a cat, who apparently decided I'd make the perfect prey! After a long, long game of cat and mouse...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gurgle...

Bwahahahaha! Whoa-ho there, you good? Ya look like you're bouta
keel over!

text_block_list.name: Fiesty Stray Cat
text_block_list.text: Mrrraow...

text_block_list.name: Fearless Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Well, if it isn't our resident furball... What's that? This stranger
was trespassin' on your turf?

text_block_list.name: Fearless Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Aw c'mon, lay off, will ya? This stranger didn't know any better. How
about ya let 'em go, huh? Good kitty, kitty, kitty!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume fearlessly reaches out and pets the hissing menace.
In an instant, the ferocious feline transforms into a tame housecat!
This is... the work of a master cat whisperer!

text_block_list.name: Fiesty Stray Cat
text_block_list.text: Meeeeeow! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fearless Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
All right, catch ya later!
So... guessin' this is your first time here? Locals don't usually get
bullied by the cats or wander 'round like lost, hungry kids.

text_block_list.name: Fearless Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Lucky for you, you ran into me! Lemme show ya to the tastiest soba
place in town!
choice_data_list: You'd do that for me? But we just met...
You'd do that for me? But we just met...

text_block_list.name: Fearless Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
So what? Leavin' people in need high and dry's not my style. Now
c'mon, let's get you some noodles!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, the fearless Umamusume leads me to the local shopping
district. She walks with such confidence, I almost think she owns the
place!

text_block_list.name: Soba Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Well, well, well, if it isn't li'l Inari! How would ya like some fried tofu?
I've got plenty to go around!

text_block_list.name: Fearless Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Oh, might needa take ya up on that! But before that, I brought ya a
customer! Can ya get 'em some soba?

text_block_list.name: Soba Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: Ah, welcome! Hehe, since Inari brought you, I better treat you right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sure enough, the soba I order comes topped with not one, but two shrimp tempura—a welcome surprise for my empty stomach!

text_block_list.name: Fearless Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
That soba really slaps, right? This joint's the best in town!
...By the way, whatcha doing in our neck of the woods, anyway?

text_block_list.name: Fearless Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
If it's a guide ya need, I'm your Horsegirl! I know these streets like the
back of my hand. So let's hear it—where ya headed?
choice_data_list: Well, I was trying to go to Oi Racecourse...

text_block_list.name: Fearless Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Hm? Did you just say... Ahahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Fearless Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Talk about good timin'! That's where I'm headed after this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With my trusty guide's help, I successfully make it to Oi Racecourse. It
looks like I'm just in time to see the local tryout races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Woooo!

text_block_list.name: Fearless Umamusume
text_block_list.text: HRRRAUGH! GET OUTTA MY WAAAY!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Who would've guessed I'd see her in the tryouts today! But more
importantly!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
At long last, the final straight! Kicking into high gear and leaving a
cloud of dust in her wake is none other than Inari One! Inari One!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Time to pull out... THE FINISHER! Urrraaaaaugh!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Inari One! Inari One takes the lead by two, no, three lengths and
growing! She's got this! Inari One...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Crosses the finish line! Inari One has won her tryout race by four
whole lengths! That little body of hers really packs a punch! A
flawless victory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I suddenly gasp for air, I realize... I was so enthralled by her race
that I forgot to breathe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A heart-pounding performance, a run powerful enough to shake the
very earth... that competitive spirit that blazes like the festival
fireworks, and the speed to leave even the sand glistening...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can tell from that race alone that she's got what it takes for turf
races—for the Twinkle Series! She's the one! I... I...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, sorry, but no. I appreciate the offer, but I can't take ya up on
that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, I rushed over to Inari One to give her my pitch. While
she was kind enough to hear me out, her answer comes quickly and
firmly.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You can probably tell by now, but I was born and raised in this town!
The people here are like family—they've been watchin' over me since
I was a teeterin' tot!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: And that includes my racin'. My trainer—Chief practically raised me, and I wanna make it big on his team.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Plus, well...

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I finally found you, Inari! Congrats on the win! I, uh... I ended up
in fifth, so I guess my stamina still needs some work...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, lighten up! All that hard work gotcha onto the scoreboard,
didn't it? Besides, pretty sure the old man has already scouted ya,
right?

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text: Yeah! And now I'm gonna be on the same team as the Inari One! I couldn't be happier! I can't wait to train with you!

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I'm interrupting your conversation, aren't I? I'll let you get
back to it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Okay, catch ya later!
...I think that convo explains things better than I could.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm an Edo girl through and through. I don't wanna leave my teacher
and all my teammates behind... Sorry 'bout that!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...Aw, c'mon, ya look like a deflated balloon. Cheer up, ya clearly got an eye for talent!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You'll find a trainee at Tracen in no time. I mean, that place is famous
for its crazy talented students, ri—
choice_data_list:
I couldn't find anyone at the school. Sure,
everyone's talented, but...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: But... what?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ah, well... I-is that so? Uhhhh...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You... know the way back, right? Try not to get cornered by the
furball this time.
Anyway, uh... thanks for comin'!
